mapper.select: SELECT b.chart_id, b.chart_type, b.chart_nm, b.svc_content_id FROM tb_svc_genre a JOIN tb_chart b ON a.svc_genre_id = b.svc_content_id WHERE a.main_disp_std_yn = 'Y' AND b.chart_type IN ('DAILY', 'NEW') AND b.svc_content_type = 'GENRE' AND b.music_content_type = 'TRACK' /*AND b.disp_start_dtime <= now()*/ /*AND b.disp_end_dtime >= now()*/ ORDER BY a.main_disp_sn, b.update_dtime DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT a.chart_id, a.chart_type, a.chart_nm, a.svc_content_id FROM ( SELECT e.chart_id, e.chart_type, e.chart_nm, e.svc_content_id, 1 ord, a.update_dtime FROM tb_character_prefer_genre a JOIN tb_prefer_genre b ON a.prefer_genre_id = b.prefer_genre_id JOIN tb_map_prefer_genre_svc_genre c ON b.prefer_genre_id = c.prefer_genre_id JOIN tb_svc_genre d ON c.svc_genre_id = d.svc_genre_id JOIN tb_chart e ON d.svc_genre_id = e.svc_content_id WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND b.use_yn = 'Y' AND e.chart_type IN ('DAILY', 'NEW') AND e.svc_content_type = 'GENRE' AND e.music_content_type = 'TRACK' /*AND f.disp_start_dtime <= now()*/ /*AND f.disp_end_dtime >= now()*/ UNION ALL SELECT g.chart_id, g.chart_type, g.chart_nm, g.svc_content_id, 3 ord, g.update_dtime FROM tb_character_prefer_disp a JOIN tb_prefer_disp b ON a.prefer_disp_id = b.prefer_disp_id JOIN tb_map_prefer_genre_prefer_disp c ON b.prefer_disp_id = c.prefer_disp_id JOIN tb_prefer_genre d ON c.prefer_genre_id = d.prefer_genre_id JOIN tb_map_prefer_genre_svc_genre e ON d.prefer_genre_id = e.prefer_genre_id JOIN tb_svc_genre f ON e.svc_genre_id = f.svc_genre_id JOIN tb_chart g ON f.svc_genre_id = g.svc_content_id WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND d.use_yn = 'Y' AND d.disp_yn = 'N' AND g.chart_type IN ('DAILY', 'NEW') AND g.svc_content_type = 'GENRE' AND g.music_content_TYPE = 'TRACK' ) a ORDER BY ord, svc_content_id, chart_type LIMIT 12

SELECT b.disp_id AS chart_id, b.prefer_disp_nm AS chart_nm, b.prefer_disp_nm AS chart_disp_nm, b.disp_props_type, c.os_type, c.img_size, c.img_url FROM tb_prefer_disp b LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_img_mang c ON b.disp_id = c.img_content_id AND b.disp_type = 'CHART' AND c.img_content_type = 'DISP' AND c.dfk_type = 'EVERY' AND c.img_disp_type = 'MAIN_TOP'

SELECT b.disp_id AS chart_id, b.prefer_disp_nm AS chart_nm, b.prefer_disp_nm AS chart_disp_nm, b.disp_props_type, c.os_type, c.img_size, c.img_url FROM tb_prefer_disp b LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_img_mang c ON b.disp_id = c.img_content_id AND b.disp_type = 'CHART' AND c.img_content_type = 'MIX_CHART' AND c.dfk_type = 'EVERY' AND c.img_disp_type = 'MAIN_TOP'
